title: Tanya boot-smoke checks
description: Schema for .tanya/boot-smoke.json. When a run edits files matching a check's trigger glob, that check's command is added to the verify-gate's required set — it must run with passing evidence before the run can report success. Guards infra edits (e.g. migrations) against breaking service boot.

trigger.description: Glob matched against the run's changed files (supports * and **). e.g. "**/migrations/*.sql".

command.description: Shell command the agent must run with passing evidence when the trigger matches. e.g. "cosmohq restart cosmohq".

healthCheck.description: Optional health-check URL to poll after the command (surfaced to the agent). e.g. "http://localhost:3003/healthz".
